title: Four Freedoms Speech
description: A Wikisource source card for Franklin D. Roosevelt's Four Freedoms speech.

pages.text: The Four Freedoms speech is a primary source for studying World War II, democratic ideals, public rhetoric, and international vision.
Use this source for analyzing repeated structure, audience, historical stakes, and how leaders define values during crisis.
Wikisource hosts public-domain and freely licensed texts. Check the linked work page for its specific license and source notes before assigning or mirroring.
